problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE annex references port names that are not visible in component type scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the AGREE annex block from component type GYRO to component implementation GYRO.IMPL

executor_steps: Remove the annex agree block from the GYRO component type
Add a new annex agree block to the GYRO.IMPL component implementation
